title: Shorts
description: This project is for a (self converted) 1.21.11+ overlay, from Zyph (Zyphalopagus). It has no block textures other than 2 flowers, and is otherwise a sound, font, entity and item pack.
body:
## This is meant for me, you guys just asked enough to where I am providing it. If there are buggy textures I won't see in Hypixel Skyblock, I won't do anything about it.

**This is a texture pack that I changed from 1.8.9 to 1.21.11+ on my own. It was originally made by Zyph(Zyphalopagus). However I have made my own changes to it and plan to add more in the future. It currently has no block textures, and thus is only a font, sound, and entity pack (as goofy as the entities look), alongside an item overlay. It also intentionally makes things vibrant, though with modern block textures, there was less of a need for that. The only block it does change, is chests, you can change that if you want.**

**I do not plan to add any block textures, but I am open to changing the colors of existing _Vanilla_ textures, like leaves, if there is interest in that. As well as make diamond armor/tools pink, for example. You can join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/SPzMxVzYT5) to make suggestions or reports on janky textures.**
